title: OfficeQA: Zipf Exponent for Unemployment Insurance (2020)

agent_trace.summary: T79 Zipf任务shogun派发超时: pc-agent-loop 300s未响应,中断于scipy.stats处理states_data阶段,需排查工作节点负载或重试
agent_trace.raw_tail:
")
print(f"  p-value = {p_value:.2e}")

# 方法2: 最大似然估计 (MLE) - 连续幂律分布的alpha估计
# 对于幂律分布 p(x) ~ x^(-alpha), MLE估计: alpha = 1 + n / sum(ln(x/x_min))
# 这里我们用秩分布的离散版本
x_min = values.min()
alpha_mle = 1 + len(values) / np.sum(np.log(values / x_min))
print(f"\n方法2: 幂律分布MLE估计 (x_min = {x_min})")
print(f"  Alpha (MLE) = {alpha_mle:.4f}")

# 方法3: 基于Zipf定律的简化估计: rank * value ≈ constant
# 取中位数估计更稳健
zipf_products = ranks * values
median_product = np.median(zipf_products)
print(f"\n方法3: 秩-值乘积中位数")
print(f"  中位数乘积: {median_product:,.0f}")
print(f"  预测值 = {median_product:,.0f} / rank")

# 可视化数据
print(f"\n{'Rank':<6}{'State':<15}{'Value($K)':<12}{'Log(Rank)':<12}{'Log(Value)':<12}{'r*value':<15}")
print("-" * 80)
for i, (state, val) in enumerate(sorted_data[:10], 1):
    print(f"{i:<6}{state:<15}{val:<12,}{np.log(i):<12.3f}{np.log(val):<12.3f}{i*val:<15,}")

print("\n..." if len(sorted_data) > 10 else "")
if len(sorted_data) > 10:
    for i, (state, val) in enumerate(sorted_data[-5:], len(sorted_data)-4):
        print(f"{i:<6}{state:<15}{val:<12,}{np.log(i):<12.3f}{np.log(val):<12.3f}{i*val:<15,}")

# 最终答案: 最常用的对数-对数回归估计
print("\n" + "=" * 50)
print(f"最终答案: Zipf指数 ≈ {-slope:.2f}")
print(f"(基于对数-对数线性回归, R²={r_value**2:.3f})")
print("=" * 50)
